article.shareMessage: Read more in Arab Tourism Magazine
article.defaultAuthorBio: Editor-in-Chief of Arab Tourism Magazine, expert in tourism media and development. The magazine is the first Saudi publication specializing in the tourism sector, aiming to highlight Arab treasures and global tourist attractions.

saved.title: Saved Articles
saved.empty: You have no saved articles. Start exploring inspiring stories!

auth.forgotPasswordSubtitle: Enter your username or email. If an account exists, we will send reset instructions.
auth.resetRequestSuccess: If an account exists for that username or email, check your inbox for next steps.
auth.resetNetworkError: Could not reach the server. Check your connection and try again.
auth.resetParseError: Could not load the reset form. Try again later.
auth.resetServerError: The server could not complete the request. Try again later.
auth.registerSubtitle: Choose a username and email. You may receive a confirmation message from the site.
auth.registerSuccess: Registration submitted. Check your email if the site sends a confirmation.
auth.registerNetworkError: Could not reach the server. Check your connection and try again.
auth.registerParseError: Registration form could not be loaded. The site may use a custom registration page.
auth.registerServerError: Registration could not be completed. Try again later.
auth.accountPasswordSubtitle: Verify your current password, then choose a new one (at least 8 characters).
auth.changePasswordNoIdentifier: Missing email or username on your profile. Sign out and sign in again.
auth.forgotPasswordOpenError: Could not open the reset link. Try again in your browser.
auth.requiredFields: Please fill in all required fields
auth.logoutConfirmMessage: Are you sure you want to log out?
auth.loginFooterNote: Sign-in uses the JWT endpoint on our server. Sign up uses the site registration form in the app.

cultural.title: Pulse of Arabic Culture
cultural.description: Culture is not just destinations, but the soul that inhabits every corner. Dive into the depths of art, calligraphy, and traditions passed down for millennia.
